name: Pie Insurance
description: Pie Insurance is a small business workers compensation insurance platform that provides a REST API for approved partners to quote, bind, and manage workers comp policies. The partner API supports appetite checking, price indication, quote submission, document upload, and retrieval of bindable quotes, enabling agencies, aggregators, and technology platforms to embed workers comp quoting directly into their own workflows.

hasOfferCatalog.name: Pie Insurance Partner API
hasOfferCatalog.description: REST API for approved partners to access workers compensation quoting and binding workflows

itemListElement.name: Appetite Checking
itemListElement.description: Check coverage eligibility for small business workers compensation insurance

itemListElement.name: Price Indication
itemListElement.description: Obtain real-time price indications for workers comp coverage

itemListElement.description: Upload documents required for policy submissions

itemListElement.name: Bindable Quote Retrieval
itemListElement.description: Retrieve bindable quotes for final policy binding

itemListElement.name: Policy Management
itemListElement.description: Manage policies including certificates of insurance
